basic_details.job_title: ICAR CRRI Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Central Rice Research Institute (ICAR CRRI) Recruitment 2026: Central Rice Research Institute is conducting a Walk-in Interview for 2 Senior Research Fellow (SRF) posts. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for eligible candidates to attend the interview directly without any prior online application.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Max. 35 years for men and 40 years for women
age_limit.details: Maximum age limit for men is 35 years. Maximum age limit for women is 40 years. Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC candidates will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. (Ag.) or Post Graduate degree in relevant fields with NET qualification and experience.
qualification.details: Senior Research Fellow (SRF): M.Sc. (Ag.) with specialization in Soil Science / Agronomy / Agricultural Microbiology / Agricultural Physics / Environmental Science / Physiology with 4-5 years Bachelor's Degree. Two years of experience in Soil, Plant and Water analysis work in laboratory and field experimentation and preparation of scientific / technical reports / papers / GIS mapping / remote sensing. Senior Research Fellow (SRF): Post Graduate degree in Botany / Microbiology / Environmental Science / Biotechnology / Geography / GIS and Remote sensing / Geoinformatics / Chemistry with 03 years Bachelor's Degree and 02 years Master's Degree. NET qualifications with 02 years of research experience.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 37,000/- p.m. + HRA as per rule
salary_details.details: Senior Research Fellow (SRF): Rs. 37,000/- p.m. + HRA as per rule

selection_process: Written-cum-personal interview Screening test (if large number of candidates)

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ICAR CRRI SRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is through a walk-in interview. The interview is scheduled for 15-06-2026. Candidates should report on this date with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Senior Research Fellow (SRF) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 37,000/- per month, plus House Rent Allowance (HRA) as per government rules.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the SRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates need an M.Sc. (Ag.) in specific specializations or a Post Graduate degree in relevant science fields, along with NET qualification and research experience, as detailed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Senior Research Fellow (SRF) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 35 years for men and 40 years for women. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Research Fellow (SRF) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Senior Research Fellow (SRF) position announced by ICAR CRRI.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is a Walk-in Interview. Eligible candidates need to attend the interview directly on the specified date and time with all required documents.

faq.question: Q7. What is the location of the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at Central Rice Research Institute (ICAR CRRI), Cuttack, Odisha, Pin code: 753006.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should candidates bring for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must bring original educational certificates, experience certificates, a passport-size photograph, and a copy of their biodata form duly filled.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q10. What is the duration of the project for which SRF is being recruited?
faq.answer: The project duration for which the Senior Research Fellow (SRF) is being recruited is up to 30.09.2026.
